data_description.host: ESP32-Divoom is an additional companion firmware acting as a Bluetooth (classic) Proxy. If you have it, you can use it instead of directly connecting to your Divoom device via Bluetooth. If not, just leave it empty and Home Assistant will connect directly via Bluetooth.

device_port.title: Divoom device: port
device_port.description: Select the channel/port of your Divoom device.

data_description.host: Optional: the hostname or IP of an ESP32 running the Divoom Gateway firmware, which acts as a Bluetooth Classic proxy. Leave empty to connect directly via the Bluetooth hardware of your Home Assistant host.

device_type.title: Divoom device: type
device_type.description: Select the type of your Divoom device.

abort.already_in_progress: There is already a Divoom device with that MAC address in progress.
abort.already_configured: There is already a Divoom device with that MAC address configured.
